positive: A cute, minimalist depiction of a steaming cup of coffee and a stack of pancakes, designed in the style of a Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock print. Simple lines, limited color palette (sepia, black, cream), highly stylized, clean composition, perfect for sticker art.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, photorealistic, clutter, busy background, messy, detailed texture
